articles.title: Healey, Campbell launch portal for reporting ICE misconduct
articles.description:
Users can submit photos, videos, and written reports about any potential misconduct they witness from federal agents enforcing immigration law.

The post Healey, Campbell launch portal for reporting ICE misconduct appeared first on Boston.com.
summary: Healey and Campbell launched a portal for reporting ICE misconduct on March 13, 2026.
Users can submit evidence like photos and videos to document federal agent actions.
This initiative aims to increase accountability and transparency in immigration enforcement in Boston.

articles.title: Jaylen Brown criticizes NBA officials for allowing foul-baiting, rewarding flopping

articles.title: $25M winning lottery ticket sold at Turners Falls convenience store
articles.description:

summary: Turners Falls convenience store sold a $25 million winning lottery ticket.

articles.title: After prior uproar over removal, new mayor to restore Italian flag road lines to Newton
articles.description:

summary: Newton's mayor will restore Italian flag road lines on Adams Street.

articles.title: Student charged in Danvers murder allegedly told police he ‘wanted to kill someone for a long time’
articles.description:
Anthony DeMayo, a Bishop Fenwick High School senior, is charged with murder and home invasion in 68-year-old Janet Swallow's death.

summary: Bishop Fenwick High School senior Anthony DeMayo charged with murder of 68-year-old Janet Swallow.

The murder raises concerns about youth violence and safety in the Danvers community.
